headline: World Wide Technology Awarded U.S. Army GEMSS 2.1 Agreement to Advance Enterprise IT Modernization
summary: ST. LOUIS, July 07, 2026--World Wide Technology (WWT) today announced it has been awarded the 12 month, $230 million U.S. Army Global Enterprise Modernization Software and Services (GEMSS) 2.1 agreement in partnership with Cisco. The follow-on award consolidates the Army Voice, Video and Security (VV&S), GEMSS 1.0, and 30 additional Cisco enterprise agreements into a centralized support solution to modernize enterprise IT infrastructure, strengthen operational readiness, and streamline software
